message:
style(core): allow collapsible_match on collect_expr_column_refs

Trailing clippy nit from the lint cleanup pass earlier in this
batch.  collect_expr_column_refs walks an Expr tree and pushes
column names into an output Vec; the inner pattern match looks
collapsible to clippy but flattening the match arms would require
duplicating the destructuring of three different Expr variants
that share the same recursive walk shape.  Add a focused
`#[allow(clippy::collapsible_match)]` so the lint stays on for
the rest of the file.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
